title: Quadlet - add support for KubeDownForce
body:
Allow users to set --force for Stop command
Add doc and tests


#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?
Yes

```release-note
Quadlet - add support for setting --force for Stop command
```

comments.body: Is there a reason for this to not be default, to match up with the --force removal with .container? If this has been answered, then point me at it?  When would you not want the play to go down when stopping the service?

> Is there a reason for this to not be default, to match up with the --force removal with .container? If this has been answered, then point me at it? When would you not want the play to go down when stopping the service?

In the `.container` case, the removal is of the container and this is already the case for the containers started as part of a `.kube` file. The `--force` flag is not about containers, but about other resources and specifically volumes. 

Now, on top of this, I don't think we should break the current default behavior.

Isn't there an issue/RFE for this PR?

> Isn't there an issue/RFE for this PR?

The discussion for this requirement started here: #20284. But, this change does not cover all the requirements listed. So, I don't think this PR should close the issue.
will this feature include in podman v4.8?

> will this feature include in podman v4.8?

Yes, it will
